domain: Romani kris customary court (Vlax Romani conflict-resolution tribunal; krisnitori elder-judges with elected chairperson; aggrieved party initiates; witness oath to ancestors; multi-stage evidence + deliberation + public verdict; sanction continuum peace-oath → fines → temporary banishment → marime ritual impurity ostracism; community-honor enforcement)
specific_mechanism: KRIS-TRIBUNAL: multi-stage tribunal-style LLM evaluation framework with elder panel + sanction continuum. (1) Aggrieved-party agent A files complaint against candidate output C with evidence excerpt. (2) Pool of N elder-judge agents J_1...J_N (diverse personas + grounding) selected; chairperson J_chair elected by intra-judge consensus. (3) Multi-stage trial procedure: (a) Evidence-presentation — each judge generates rubric assessment with evidence-anchored excerpts; (b) Deliberation phase — chair-directed structured exchange + cross-examination; (c) Sanction-verdict on continuum (full-accept / partial-revise / reject / marime-blacklist for egregious safety violations). (4) Marime-blacklist mechanism: blacklisted candidate ostracized from downstream pipeline. (5) Restoration path: revised candidate re-enters via reapplication; chairperson reviews compliance with prior verdict.
llm_application: KRIS-TRIBUNAL multi-stage LLM evaluation with elder-judge panel + chair-elected coordinator + sanction continuum + marime-blacklist + restoration-path. Differs from Constitutional AI 2212.08073 (single-cycle generate→critique→revise with constitutional principles — no multi-judge panel + chair-elected + sanction continuum). Rubric-Based + LLM-as-Judge 2026 (rubric decomposition + LLM judges — but no chair-elected panel + sanction-continuum). C3AI Constitutions WWW 2025 (crafting constitutions framework — no tribunal procedure). RULERS 2601.08654 (locked rubrics + evidence-anchored — closest, but no multi-stage tribunal + chair + sanction continuum + restoration-path). Differs from R456 JHATOR-EXTERNAL-JUDGE (vulture-pool consensus + re-grind, no chair-elected tribunal), R359 ETRUSCAN-HARUSPEX (anatomical-zone divination), R430 KINTSUGI-CRACK (heat-stress diagnostic), R418 SUTARTINES-EVAL (close-harmony judge), R445 IFA-BINARY (256-cell binary lookup) by EXPLICIT MULTI-STAGE TRIBUNAL + CHAIR-ELECTED + SANCTION CONTINUUM + RESTORATION-PATH.
novelty_claim: Constitutional AI + Rubric-Based + C3AI + RULERS cover tribunal-style multi-stage LLM evaluation paradigm. KRIS-TRIBUNAL adds (a) chair-elected elder panel + (b) sanction continuum (peace-oath → revise → reject → marime-blacklist) + (c) restoration-path reapplication. Recombination — panel + rubrics + sanctions individually mainstream.
